# SwiftTerm upstream provenance

- Repository: https://github.com/migueldeicaza/SwiftTerm.git
- Version: v1.13.0
- Revision: `8e7a1e154f470e19c709a00a8768df348ba5fc43`

This source is vendored in place for local integration work.

Do not hand-edit vendored source without:
1. saving a corresponding patch artifact under `packages/expo-swift-term/patches/`
2. recording the reason for the change
